# ============================================================
# Pakistan Rural Education Dashboard — ASER 2023
# requirements.txt
# ============================================================
# Install with:   pip install -r requirements.txt
# Python version: 3.10+
# ============================================================

# ── Core Data Science ──────────────────────────────────────
numpy>=1.24.0
pandas>=2.0.0
scipy>=1.11.0

# ── Machine Learning ───────────────────────────────────────
scikit-learn>=1.7.0       # Random Forest model training & prediction
joblib>=1.3.0             # Model serialization (.pkl loading)

# ── Model Interpretability ─────────────────────────────────
# REQUIRED: best_model_bundle.pkl contains a SHAP explainer object.
# The pkl will FAIL to load if shap is not installed.
shap>=0.44.0

# ── Dashboard Framework ────────────────────────────────────
streamlit>=1.35.0

# ── Visualization ──────────────────────────────────────────
plotly>=5.18.0            # Interactive charts, choropleth maps
matplotlib>=3.7.0         # Static plots (SHAP beeswarm, confusion matrix)
seaborn>=0.13.0           # Statistical visualization

# ── Excel Support ──────────────────────────────────────────
openpyxl>=3.1.0           # Reading ITAASER2023School.xlsx
xlrd>=2.0.1               # Legacy .xls support (optional)

# ── Geospatial (optional, for advanced map work) ───────────
# Uncomment if you process GeoJSON programmatically:
# geopandas>=0.14.0
# shapely>=2.0.0

# ── Notebook / Development ─────────────────────────────────
jupyter>=1.0.0
ipykernel>=6.25.0
notebook>=7.0.0

# ── Utilities ──────────────────────────────────────────────
requests>=2.31.0
python-dotenv>=1.0.0      # For environment variable management (optional)

# ============================================================
# NOTES
# ============================================================
#
# 1. shap install may require build tools on some systems:
#    Linux:   sudo apt-get install build-essential
#    macOS:   xcode-select --install
#    Windows: Install Visual C++ Build Tools
#
# 2. If you encounter a scikit-learn version warning when
#    loading best_model_bundle.pkl, re-save the model in your
#    environment:
#      import joblib
#      bundle = joblib.load('models/best_model_bundle.pkl')
#      joblib.dump(bundle, 'models/best_model_bundle.pkl')
#
# 3. For the choropleth map to work, replace:
#      data/pakistan_districts.geojson
#    with a proper 151-district Pakistan GeoJSON from:
#      https://gadm.org/download_country.html  (Level 3)
#      https://data.humdata.org/dataset/cod-ab-pak
#
# ============================================================
